recommendations.title: Significant moisture deficit
recommendations.message: ET0 has outpaced rainfall by 36mm over the last 7 days. Irrigate soon to avoid drought stress, especially on free-draining areas.

recommendations.title: Dollar spot risk is building
recommendations.message: Modelled risk is 18%, approaching the 20% threshold. Reduce leaf wetness duration where you can (mow or brush off dew early, avoid evening irrigation) and monitor daily.

recommendations.title: Topsoil is dry
recommendations.message: Modelled topsoil moisture is 11%. Consider irrigation, especially if the water balance above also shows a deficit.

recommendations.title: Active growth — mow more frequently
recommendations.message: Growing degree days are accumulating at 14.1/day over the last week. Expect to mow every 3-4 days to avoid removing more than a third of leaf blade in one cut.

errors: no Environment Agency rainfall station within 15.0km (EA covers England & Wales only)
